## Meeting Purpose

[Bi-weekly knowledge share between AirOps and GXL, focusing on new features, demos, and gathering feedback for prioritizing feature requests.](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AirOps introduced new features: Google Search Console integration, human review content comparison mode, and LLM model menu](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [GXL provided valuable feedback on feature requests, particularly for SEO-related workflows and large-scale keyword analysis](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Human review comparison feature demonstrated, showing potential for significant impact on content editing processes](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)

## Topics

### Google Search Console Integration Demo

  - [New grid option for importing Google Search Console data (queries and pages)](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=337.0)
  - [Demonstrated workflow for improving SEO rankings:](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=376.0)
      - [Filter for position 2 results, sort by impressions](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=487.0)
      - [Scrape top-ranking competitor content](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=564.0)
      - [Compare with own content and generate SEO improvement suggestions](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=581.0)
  - [Potential for custom date ranges and automated refresh of data requested](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=801.0)

### SEO Workflow Feedback (Marcel)

  - [Current process involves manual export of keyword gap analysis from SEMrush due to API limitations](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
  - [Challenges with processing large volumes of keywords (e.g., 62,000 keywords narrowed to \~20,000)](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Request for more granular API controls and filtering options to improve workflow efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1204.0)
  - [Need for better keyword clustering capabilities for large datasets without excessive LLM usage](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Suggestion to explore SQL-based approaches for handling large datasets](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1415.0)

### Human Review Content Comparison Demo

  - [New feature allowing side-by-side comparison of before and after content](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1574.0)
  - [Options for word, sentence, or paragraph-level comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [Ability to accept/reject changes individually or in bulk](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Support for markdown and HTML link formatting](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1712.0)
  - [Potential for significant impact on content editing workflows](https://fathom.video/share/uF9o_Y33tJyVznXTFDye8nJ3qhckzgKs?tab=summary&timestamp=1764.0)

## Next Steps

  - Explore adding custom date ranges and automated refresh for Google Search Console data
  - Investigate improvements to SEMrush API integration, including more granular controls and filtering options
  - Consider SQL-based approaches for handling large datasets in SEO workflows
  - Continue gathering feedback on the new human review comparison feature
  - Follow up with Marcel regarding specific SEO workflow challenges and potential solutions
